# Dutch GDPR Implementation Act

Jurisdiction: Netherlands
Region: NL
Citation: Uitvoeringswet Algemene verordening gegevensbescherming
Authority: Overheid.nl / Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens
Source URL: https://wetten.overheid.nl/BWBR0040940/
Topics: sensitive_data, children_data, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: UAVG, Dutch GDPR Implementation Act, Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens

## Summary
Dutch GDPR implementation act containing national provisions and exemptions for applying GDPR in the Netherlands.

## Key compliance obligations
- Check Dutch age, sensitive-data, and exemption provisions.
- Use AP guidance for Dutch enforcement expectations.
- Document reliance on national derogations.
